feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Event Mesh
feed.subtitle: SAP Event Mesh Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to create a CUSTOM EVENT in ABAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to create a CUSTOM EVENT in ABAP for event mesh in IBD instead of standard event?

Can you please share tutorial/video with steps?

Thanks,

Rehan

entry.title: Options to send date from S4 Hana (cloud) to CPI - real-time and bulk
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a S4 Hana (cloud) and a SAP CPI system, and are exploring different options to send outbound data (S4 to CPI) in real-time as well as bulk.

1. As soon as a Purchase Order is created or changed in S4, it's details should be sent to CPI. One option I have seen is using Event Mesh (SAP Event Mesh | End To End Tutorial with Cloud Pl... - SAP Community) to achieve this. Is there any option to achieve real-time transmission without Event Mesh?

2. If S4 needs to send the changes in bulk. E.g. At 11:50 PM, send all the Purchase Orders created and changed for that day, what options do we have?

 

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh in trial account
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

Is SAP Event Mesh (or AEM or EMIS) available in the trial account? I followed the below document but don't see Event Mesh service in it.

Creating an Event Mesh Instance Using the Default Plan | SAP Help Portal

Thanks,

entry.title: Challenge with SAP Event Mesh: Status Code 200 in Postman and ABAP, but 503 in Event Mesh
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

In our current architecture, we use SAP Event Mesh to transmit messages to SAP IS-U (R3). The process involves an SAP Event Mesh webhook calling a SICF service under the path /sap/event_mesh_api/ via the URL /sap/event_mesh_api/events?sap-client=XXX within our IS-U environment. However, in tests with Postman and an ABAP report, we get different results: 

Test with Postman and ABAP Report: 

When testing the target URL /sap/event_mesh_api/events?sap-client=XXX using Postman or an ABAP report, we receive an HTTP status code 200, indicating a successful connection and response. 

 

Test with SAP Event Mesh Webhook: 

However, when the Event Mesh webhook calls the same URL, an HTTP status code 503 is logged in Event Mesh. This suggests that the target URL is either unreachable or there is a failure in server-side processing. 

 

Monitoring and Troubleshooting: 

No messages are displayed in Cloud Connector Monitoring. This could mean that the message either never reaches the Cloud Connector or that an error in processing prevents the message from being correctly logged. 

 

Internal Test Service: 

To further test the functionality of Event Mesh, we connected an internal test service. When triggering the service through the webhook, we observed that the messages were successfully delivered via Event Mesh to the service. This confirms that the basic configuration of Event Mesh is working. 

 

Issue with the Cloud Connector: 

However, a problem arises when the Cloud Connector is involved in the communication. The messages that are supposed to be sent via the Event Mesh webhook to the IS-U environment do not reach the Cloud Connector. We suspect that the issue lies within the Cloud Connector configuration, but we have not yet identified the exact cause. 

 

Contact with SAP Support: 

SAP Support was unable to reproduce the problem in their environment; the connection worked flawlessly on their side. 

Question to the Community: We are facing the challenge that the Event Mesh webhook does not provide the same response as the tests in Postman or ABAP. Instead, it returns a status code 503, indicating a service failure. 

Has anyone in the community experienced similar issues with SAP Event Mesh? If so, what steps or solutions were helpful in troubleshooting? 

Some specific questions where we need assistance: 

Different Status Codes: Why might the Event Mesh webhook return a status code 503, while direct tests with Postman or ABAP return a status code 200? 

 

Monitoring Issue: Why do the messages not appear in Cloud Connector Monitoring? Are there specific settings or logs that could provide more insight into the cause of the problem? 

 

Cloud Connector Issue: Has anyone experienced similar issues related to Cloud Connector configuration? What specific points should we check? 

 

Additional Tests or Configurations: What other tests or configuration changes could be helpful in identifying the root cause of the problem? 

We look forward to your experiences, tips, and solutions to help resolve this issue. 

Thank you in advance for your support! 

Attachment: Following this post, you will find screenshots documenting the issues described, configuration and our previous tests. 

 

 

 

 

 

 


#SAPEventMesh #SAPBTP #CloudConnector #SAPIntegration #ISU #ABAP #SAPTechWebhooks #SAPSupport #SAPArchitectur

entry.title: SAP CAP - Event Mesh Consumption of Messages Not working
entry.content:
I am trying to test the event mesh with a simple emit and consumption service in SAP CAP. I am able to publish a message to the topic, and it is visible in the event mesh dashboard under the queue. However, when I try to consume the message, it is not working. The count in the queue is not decreasing, and the console.log inside messaging.on is not being triggered. I am not sure what mistake I am making.

 

 

 this.on('messagePersistence', async (req) => {
            try {
                const messaging = await cds.connect.to('messaging')

                messaging.emit({
                    event: 'test/cap/dev/publisher',
                    data: `Hello`
                })

                messaging.on('test/cap/dev/publisher', msg => {
                    console.log(msg.data)
                })
                console.log('Messaging Emitted Done')
                return 'OK'
            }
            catch (e) {
                console.log(e)
            }
        });

 

 

 

  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "auth": "xsuaa",
      "messaging": {
        "kind": "local-messaging",
        "[production]": {
          "kind": "enterprise-messaging" 
        } 
      }
    }
  }

entry.title: Cloud Integration - Advanced Event Mesh Adapter Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to use the "Advanced Event Mesh" Adapter from Cloud Integration. However, when I publish a message to a topic, I encounter the following error:

  • org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException: A reply was not received within the allotted time [1000 ms]


The message is correctly published in the AEM, I can see it in the subscribed queue, but the adapter still throws the error, even when publication went fine.

This is my configuration:

Could you please assist with this issue? I'd like to use this adapter, but the iFlow encounters an error even when the publishing seems to work fine.

P.S.: This very same iFlow works completely fine with the "AMQP" Receiver adapter, but I'd like to take advantage of the dedicated adapter's enhanced functionality.

Thank you!

entry.content:
Hi All,
we are getting below error when deploying a AMQP based flow:

the flow deployed successfully after un-deploying other AMQP based flow.
are there any constraint issues here? 

Below is the Resource Monitor page for reference:

 



SAP Event Mesh Cloud Integration

entry.title: CAP Node JS Event Mesh Consume Message failed with payload chunks buffer
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I've posted a message to Event Mesh using httprest protocol like that

With json payload

const messageData = {
                        "test": "test"
                    };
 
On EventMesh consumer apps istream 
.on("data", async (oMessage)
i got payload with payload.data is null but payload.chunks[0].data have data 
Step 0.1 Message: {"source":{"address":"default/test","reliable":true,"persistent":false,"redelivered":false},"target":{},"payload":{"chunks":[{"type":"Buffer","data":[123,34,116,101,115,116,34,58,34,116,101,115,116,34,125]}],"type":"application/json","encoding":null,"data":null,"properties":null}}
 
Then i'm trying to parse chunks buffer like that

I've succcess parse message on BAS, VS Code with code of logic above (and real payload i got from BTP apps logs)

 


 

but i got error  when i deployed to Cloud foundry

stacktrace":["TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: The first argument must be of type string or an instance of Buffer, ArrayBuffer, or Array or an Array-like Object. Received undefined"," at Function.from (node:buffer:319:9)"," at IncomingStream.<anonymous>

Please give me advice

1. Do i need change some config, add any header, params... to post message to Queue with message.payload.data for consumer instead of message.payload.chunks[0].data

2. If can't post message to queue with payload to message.payload.data then how can i resolve Buffer parse error above?

FYI:

- Checked node version on BAS, VSCode, Cloud Foundry is same also, set node engines in package.json as well

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Modify SAP Advance Event Mesh Queue Message attributes like Message ID, Sequence ID etc...
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 We have recently introduced SAP AEM in our SAP Landscape and I have a question regarding Publishing messages to a Queue. I could not get help from Standard SAP help documents or from Solace help Links. Any help on this would be really appreciated. We are on AEM Version 10.4.0.23

Every time we publish a message to Event Broker, either via Publishing directly to a Queue or via a TOPIC, AEM generates a Message ID for this. Along with this message id, AEM also store various other attributes of this message.

My Questions are:

1. Can we override AEM generated Message ID from our own Custom message ID (like IDOC number, Work Order number, or SCPI message ID etc...). In the attached screenshot it is: 984

2. How can we update other attributes of a Message like:   

Sequence Number, Message ID (0003dB), Replication Mate Msd ID

3. Why we have two Message IDs -  984 and 0003dB

Regards,

Anuj

entry.title: S/4 HANA Application job scheduling based on condition/event
entry.content:
Hi,

S/4 HANA private cloud system.

We are checking the option to schedule the S/4 HANA application job based on some condition/event because we are having some dependency from other systems job completion status (SuccessFactor, IBP, etc.,) .

We didn't see the event/condition based scheduling options in Application Jobs FIORI app.

Is there any possibility to start S/4 HANA application jobs based on completion of dependency jobs from other systems?

Best Regards,

Anand

entry.title: Issue subscribing to an event broker from solace in CI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to subscribe to an event broker created on solace through advanced event mesh adapter in CI. I am getting the below mentioned error on deploying the iFlow. Please assist.

Regards,

Varun Vichare.

entry.title: Create RAP Business Events for change pointers / IDocs
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are in an S/4HANA conversion project to S4H 2023 FPS1 On-Prem. On a separate note we are asked to provide a future looking concept for a more event base / pushed based integration landscape.

That being said I stumbled upon RAP Business Events, and my takeaway was that this ought to be the way forward for event based integration that originates from an ABAP Platform (here S4H 2023) system.

Now one of the current interfaces (of course) distributes parts of the material master to an external system. Currently this is pull, so the external system periodically asks for changes. We want to switch this to push, and levaraging an EDA, e.g. SAP Event Mesh in Integration Suite.

My questions

  1.  Is my assumption, that RAP Business Events is generally the future direction and would be a match for the requirement correct?
  2. If using RAP BE, how would we raise those events for a changed material? Can we use change pointers or existing BOR event linkages?
  3. Optional: What benefits will the also existing Event Enablement Add-On for S/4HANA play in such regard. Is it even necessary when we are on S4H 2023 FPS1 (I also read that with FPS2 some additional features arrive in the area of RAP

Many thanks and kind regards

Jens

entry.title: Eventdriven Achitecture using BTPEA instead of CPEA - Do you have ideas?
entry.content:
Hi all,

i need your thoughts/ideas on something. A long time ago (just before they announced BTPEA), we had the wonderful option to use EventMesh for just a few euro's. Perfect for an event driven architecture. Just like SAP wants. Connect Process Automation or integration suite using Webhooks, wonderful!

Suddenly, BTPEA came along. During a partner call it was stated that some features now available in CPEA would be cancelled or put in some "container" in BTPEA. The advantage of BTPEA would be that all services could be consumed (CPEA didn't gave the option to do everything with credits).

During the partnercall we could see in a glimps that Eventmesh would not be available in BTPEA as a separate service, but would be included as a capability in Integration Suite........"but no worries! You can still get eventmesh using a subscription and/or payg to get your cost effective Event Driven Architecture up and running"

Well, a significant amount of months later (Q4-2024), this is the situation:

  • Eventmesh is only available in CPEA (which is officially not sold anymore (but you can still get it if you really want to)
  • BTPEA does not have a separate EventMesh option to activate
  • Eventmesh is only part of the Integration Suite Standard edition
  • Eventmesh is in no way to be bought using subscription and/or Payg (Advanced eventmesh doesn't count, that is more expensive than 1 integration suite tenant).

Considering the growth of Public Cloud customers with a basic need for integration (Base edition), how can we still utilize an event driven architecture? 

Some suggestions:

  1. Just make Eventmesh available again in BTPEA
  2. Make it available as a PayG and/or Subscription option (and make sure we can keep it within on global account)
  3. Make it available in the Base edition of Integration Suite (i can live with that)

Just needed to get this of my chest.

All the best

Laurens

entry.title: Setup needed on SAP backend to generate events
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What is the techincal Setup needed on SAP backend to generate events? What are steps that should be followed on SAP Backend for generation of events, technical connection and also to publish the generated events to Advanced Event Mesh? Should there be channel created also?  Thank you!

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: Standalone Event mesh Roadmap
entry.content:
Hello SAP /Experts,

Can you please suggest if standalone Event mesh should be used in new implementation  ,as use case is not extensive and does not require Advance event mesh solution and is not fitting in the t-shirt size of Advance event mesh scenario ,if standalone event mesh can be used in new implementation, can the monitoring capability be enhanced ?

what is SAP recommendation on usage of standalone event mesh , i am not finding any definitive information and guidance here ,please suggest.

Thanks,

Siddharth

SAP Event Mesh SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Share Event mesh between sub account
entry.content:
I have seen same question being replied by other fellow community members , but I don't see any of them marked answered. 

I have 2 sub accounts. A and B. I have event mesh enabled in A , and few apps are deployed in A. Now I have one app , that is deployed in B . It must receive the messages emitted by a service in A. I do not want to manually maintain the credentials of event mesh in credential store and then consume it from the app. I tried creating a UPS but its not resolving the credentials (https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-connect#vcap_services , https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sharing-event-mesh-across-subaccounts/qaq-p/12708215 ) . 

Q : Whats the right way to get a user provided service to make the service resolution work ? or is there any other methods to fulfil this, 

 

Sree

entry.title: Disable automatic subscription create - CAPM
entry.content:
I am using SAP Event mesh in my cap application. I observed that the application takes care of creating subscriptions in the queue when it encounters the .on method of the messaging instance. 

Is there any options to disable it ? I will take care of queue subscriptions.

entry.title: How to restrict access to queues for specific clients in Advanced Event Mesh?
entry.content:
The documentation specifies how access to topics can be achieved through ACL's. But it is not clear how the same can be done for queues.

Is it possible to define that a client can only publish or consume messages from certain Queues? My understanding is that by default all clients can consume from all queues.

Example scenario of my requirements:

Client A should only be able to consume Queues X and Y

Client B should only be able to consume Queue Y

Client C should only be able to consume from Queues that follow a certain naming convention

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Where can I get the event specification for a custom RAP BO event defined in S/4HANA on-premise?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have developed a custom event based on RAP BO to trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation. In order to create a custom event project, we need to upload an event specification from the Build Lobby.

Now, my question is where I can get the event specification for a custom event in S/4HANA on-premise? For S/4HANA Public Cloud, I've seen the "Maintain Event Channel Binding" Fiori app was used to get the metadata, but I cannot find the same option in the channel configuration customizing.

Any input is greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have configured Event Mesh (in Integration Suite) and SAP Build Process Automation to start a process when a journal entiry is created in S/4HANA on-premise.

A webhook subscription has been created in Event Mesh, and the handshake was successful.

 

A process has been created with an event trigger, and deployed.

When a journal entry is created in S/4HANA, the number of t"Message Queued" increased to 1, and soon decreased to 0. This indicates that the message was sent to the webhook (Build Process Automation).

However, no process started in Build Process Automation. Now I am wondering where the message has gone.

Monitoroing > Event Aquisition > Business Events shows no data.

Could anyone tell me where such "lost" events can be monitored and investigated?

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake
